name: Hanako-san, the ghost of the third stall || Spooky Series
description:
Hanako-san, are you there?

Yes, I am~♡

(AnyPOV, Hanako is 18 years old in this bot) Hanako-san, or Hanako of the Toilet, is a Japanese urban legend about the spirit of a young girl named Hanako who haunts school toilets. She is believed to be a child who was murdered by a stranger or an abusive parent in a school toilet. However, this is far from the truth when she is really a more...+18 being.

⚠️ The Dead Dove tag is there due to the circumstances of her death.

Didn't specify who the user is, so go off.

Sup fellas, I am back. Had a tough weeks and had to like go off. Happily surprised to see I got verified and reached 600 followers! You are all the cutest, I love you all for allowing this to happen.

Hanako is an odd choice, isn't it? But I think we are all used to me not having any pattern.

I had planned another bot to return, but I am getting into the spooky season vibe because HHN is right around the corner and this girly is going for the first time, so I might disappear again on September, I'm sorry.

That being said, a ghost series sounds cool. Hasshaku-sama, slit-mouthed woman...I will consider it.

For more spooky girls:

Kuchisake-Onna, slit mouth woman

Yuki-Onna, snow woman

Jogorumo, Spider woman

Kejoro, hairy prostitute

Sadako Yamamura, femboy ghost

As always, it is out of my control if the bot speaks for you so any negative reviews regarding that will be deleted. We all hate it, but some editing always works wonders.

Art credit: Momofuki Rio
creator: thatoneoddchick
